subject: Your mentor couldn't take this request
html:
Hi {{first_name}},

Unfortunately, {{mentor_name}} couldn't take your mentorship request. {{decline_info}}

Don't take it personally — it happens. Try reaching out to another mentor; there are plenty of great ones in our catalog:

Find another mentor

Tip: describe your situation in a bit more detail — what problem you're stuck on, where you want to get to, and what you expect from a mentor. It makes it much easier for a mentor to see whether they can help.

Good luck!
The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
